text: 10. It is the intent of this Subcontract that all items are included in the Work as required for a complete package and intended  to  provide  a  complete  operational  assembly.  Should  there  ever  be  a  dispute  or  disagreement,  this Subcontractor agrees that this Subcontract will cover all costs for anything that may be lacking from the Subcontract Documents, which can be reasonably inferred to be required, and shall be assumed to be included within the Work. This Subcontractor agrees that it has reviewed the Subcontract Documents, including the latest Addendums, and to the best of their knowledge, the Subcontract Documents are complete and inclusive of all items required for a complete package.
